---
title-block: false
standalone: true
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    theme: minty
    fontsize: 1rem
    linestretch: 1.6
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
    embed-resources: true # output file is self-contained and sharable
    
execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| label: config
#| include: false

from src.report import data, config, display
from IPython.display import Markdown

# ---- config & params -----
cfg = config.load_config("_quarto.yml")
params = config.parse_params(cfg)

# ----  colors palette ----
okabe_ito = [
  "#E69F00", # orange
  "#56B4E9", # sky blue
  "#009E73", # bluish green
  "#F0E442", # yellow
  "#0072B2", # blue
  "#D55E00", # vermillion
  "#CC79A7", # reddish purple
  "#999999"  # grey
]

df = data.load_inputs(params)
```

<!-- Title / Header -->

::: {style="background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bs-primary) 15%, white); padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px;"}
# National Influenza Genomic Surveillance Report

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Country**: {{< meta params.country.name >}} \
**Influenza season**: {{< meta params.season >}} \
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Date of Report**: {{< meta params.date >}} \
**Reporting period**: {{< meta params.period.start >}} – {{< meta params.period.end >}}
:::
::::
:::

## 1. Executive Summary

This report summarizes influenza virus genomic surveillance conducted during the **{{< meta params.season >}}** influenza season in **{{< meta params.country.name >}}**. Surveillance integrates routine virological testing with whole-genome sequencing to monitor circulating influenza strains, genetic diversity, antiviral resistance markers, and phylogenetic relationships.

#### Key findings:
```{python}
#| label: key_findings
#| lst-cap: "Dominant clades exclude `Undetermined`."

display.key_findings(df)
```

---

## 2. Surveillance System and Sample Collection
```{python}
#| label: sample_collection

display.sample_collection(df)
```

## 3. Virological Screening Results

### 3.1 Total Specimens Tested
```{python}
display.total_specimens(df)
```

### 3.2 Influenza Type and Subtype Distribution

```{python}
display.subtype_summary(df)
```

---

## 4. Sequencing Overview

### 4.1 Sequencing Selection Criteria

#### Specimens were selected for sequencing based on:
```{python}
display.sequencing_criteria(df)
```

### 4.2 Sequencing Output and Quality

```{python}
display.sequencing_output(df)
```

## 5. Clade and Subclade Distribution

```{python}
#| results: asis
display.clade_summary(df)
```

## 6. Antiviral Resistance Markers

### 6.1 Neuraminidase H275Y (A(H1N1)pdm09)

| Metric | Count |
|------|------:|
| A(H1N1)pdm09 genomes analyzed | |
| Viruses with H275Y mutation | |
| Percentage with H275Y | |

**Interpretation:**  
The H275Y substitution is associated with reduced susceptibility to oseltamivir.

---

## 7. Phylogenetic Analysis

### 7.1 Methods

- **Alignment:** **[e.g., MAFFT]**
- **Phylogenetic inference:** **[e.g., IQ-TREE / FastTree]**
- **Reference strains:** WHO vaccine reference strains for the **[season]** season
- **Gene(s) analyzed:** ☐ HA ☐ NA ☐ Whole genome

### 7.2 Phylogenetic Tree Summary

- Circulating viruses clustered primarily with **[reference clade/strain]**
- No major divergent clusters were observed ☐ / Divergent clusters were observed ☐
- Genetic diversity was **[low / moderate / high]**

---

## 8. Data Sharing

```{python}
#| style: "max-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto;"
display.sequence_submissions(df)
```

---

## 9. Limitations

- Sequencing coverage may not be fully representative of all regions.
- Selection bias due to Ct-based sequencing thresholds.
- Turnaround time varied during peak transmission periods.

---

## 10. Conclusions and Public Health Implications

{{< meta params.conclusion >}}

---

## 11. Acknowledgements

We acknowledge sentinel sites, laboratories, clinicians, and data contributors supporting influenza surveillance in {{< meta params.country.name >}}.

---

## 12. Contact Information

**Institution:**  {{< meta params.institution >}} \
**Email:**  {{< meta params.email >}} \
**Phone:**  {{< meta params.phone >}} \
